# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

---
elasticsearch:
  cluster_name: prod-es
  endpoints:
    - https://es01.example.com:9200
  auth:
    type: basic
    username: elastic
    password_env: ES_PASSWORD
  ssl:
    verify: true
    ca_cert_path: /etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.crt
  request:
    timeout: 60s
    headers:
      Content-Type: application/json

snapshot:
  repositories:
    - name: ops-snapshots-s3
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: ops-elasticsearch-snapshots
        base_path: prod/cluster-a
        region: us-east-1
        compress: true
        server_side_encryption: true
        canned_acl: private
        storage_class: standard
        chunk_size: 64mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
      verification:
        verify: true
    - name: ops-snapshots-fs
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/es-snapshots/prod/cluster-a
        compress: true
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
      verification:
        verify: true

  defaults:
    repository: ops-snapshots-s3
    snapshot_name_format: "auto-{cluster}-{yyyy.MM.dd-HH.mm.ss}"
    include_global_state: true
    ignore_unavailable: true
    partial: false
    metadata:
      created_by: ops-automation
      purpose: automated-backups

  schedules:
    - name: hourly
      enabled: true
      cron: "0 5 * * * ?"
      timezone: UTC
      policy:
        repository: ops-snapshots-s3
        indices:
          - "*"
        feature_states:
          - "*"
        include_global_state: true
        ignore_unavailable: true
        partial: false
        wait_for_completion: false
      retention:
        expire_after: 7d
        min_count: 48
        max_count: 500
    - name: daily
      enabled: true
      cron: "0 30 1 * * ?"
      timezone: UTC
      policy:
        repository: ops-snapshots-s3
        indices:
          - "*"
        feature_states:
          - "*"
        include_global_state: true
        ignore_unavailable: true
        partial: false
        wait_for_completion: false
      retention:
        expire_after: 30d
        min_count: 14
        max_count: 200

  actions:
    create_snapshot:
      method: PUT
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
      params:
        wait_for_completion: "{wait_for_completion}"
      body:
        indices: "{indices}"
        ignore_unavailable: "{ignore_unavailable}"
        include_global_state: "{include_global_state}"
        partial: "{partial}"
        metadata: "{metadata}"
    restore_snapshot:
      method: POST
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}/_restore"
      params:
        wait_for_completion: "{wait_for_completion}"
      body:
        indices: "{indices}"
        rename_pattern: "{rename_pattern}"
        rename_replacement: "{rename_replacement}"
        include_global_state: "{include_global_state}"
        include_aliases: "{include_aliases}"
        ignore_unavailable: "{ignore_unavailable}"
        partial: "{partial}"
        index_settings: "{index_settings}"
        ignore_index_settings: "{ignore_index_settings}"
    list_snapshots:
      method: GET
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_all"
      params:
        verbose: "true"
    delete_snapshot:
      method: DELETE
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
    create_repository:
      method: PUT
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}"
      body:
        type: "{type}"
        settings: "{settings}"
    verify_repository:
      method: POST
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_verify"
    cleanup_repository:
      method: POST
      path: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_cleanup"
    status:
      method: GET
      path: "/_snapshot/_status"

  runbooks:
    create:
      repository: ops-snapshots-s3
      snapshot: "manual-{cluster}-{yyyy.MM.dd-HH.mm.ss}"
      indices:
        - "*"
      include_global_state: true
      ignore_unavailable: true
      partial: false
      wait_for_completion: true
      metadata:
        created_by: ops
        reason: on-demand
    restore:
      repository: ops-snapshots-s3
      snapshot: "CHANGEME_SNAPSHOT"
      indices:
        - "*"
      include_global_state: false
      include_aliases: true
      ignore_unavailable: true
      partial: false
      wait_for_completion: true
      rename_pattern: "^(.*)$"
      rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
      index_settings:
        index.number_of_replicas: 0
      ignore_index_settings:
        - index.refresh_interval

ops_team:
  prerequisites:
    s3:
      elasticsearch_keystore:
        - key: s3.client.default.access_key
          value_env: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
        - key: s3.client.default.secret_key
          value_env: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
        - key: s3.client.default.session_token
          value_env: AWS_SESSION_TOKEN
      notes:
        - "Ensure repository-s3 plugin is installed on all nodes."
    fs:
      path_repo:
        - "/mnt/es-snapshots"
      notes:
        - "Ensure shared filesystem is mounted on all nodes and listed in path.repo."
        - "Ensure repo path is identical across nodes."

automation:
  tool: elasticsearch-api
  workflows:
    bootstrap_repositories:
      steps:
        - action: create_repository
          args:
            repository: ops-snapshots-s3
            type: s3
            settings:
              bucket: ops-elasticsearch-snapshots
              base_path: prod/cluster-a
              region: us-east-1
              compress: true
              server_side_encryption: true
              canned_acl: private
              storage_class: standard
              chunk_size: 64mb
              max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
              max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
        - action: verify_repository
          args:
            repository: ops-snapshots-s3
        - action: create_repository
          args:
            repository: ops-snapshots-fs
            type: fs
            settings:
              location: /mnt/es-snapshots/prod/cluster-a
              compress: true
              max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
              max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
        - action: verify_repository
          args:
            repository: ops-snapshots-fs
    snapshot_now:
      steps:
        - action: create_snapshot
          args:
            repository: "{repository}"
            snapshot: "{snapshot}"
            indices:
              - "*"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: true
            partial: false
            wait_for_completion: true
            metadata:
              created_by: ops-automation
              trigger: manual
    restore_from_snapshot:
      steps:
        - action: restore_snapshot
          args:
            repository: "{repository}"
            snapshot: "{snapshot}"
            indices:
              - "*"
            rename_pattern: "^(.*)$"
            rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
            include_global_state: false
            include_aliases: true
            ignore_unavailable: true
            partial: false
            wait_for_completion: true
            index_settings:
              index.number_of_replicas: 0
            ignore_index_settings:
              - index.refresh_interval
